name: Light Vegetable Broth (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 2 large potatoes, scrubed and coarsely chopped
1 leek, white part only, clean, and thinly sliced
1/2 lb mushrooms, cleaned and left whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a large soup pot.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 3 to 4 hours.
4. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container.
5. Discard the vegetables.
6. Allow the broth to cool before refrigerating or freezing in 1- to 2-cup containers for use in recipes calling for vegetable stock or broth.
